sentences.target: Im Feber fahre ich nach Wien.

translations.de: Im Feber fahre ich nach Wien.
translations.en: In February I'm going to Vienna.
translations.fr: En février, je vais à Vienne.
translations.ru: В феврале я поеду в Вену.
translations.vi: Tháng Hai tôi sẽ đến Vienna.
translations.nl: In februari ga ik naar Wenen.
translations.uk: У лютому я поїду до Відня.
translations.nb: I februar drar jeg til Wien.
translations.id: Pada Februari saya akan pergi ke Wina.
translations.sv: I februari åker jag till Wien.
translations.da: I februar tager jeg til Wien.

tokens.explanation: Contraction of the preposition 'in' + definite article 'dem'; governs dative; introduces a temporal PP ('in February').
Proper name of the month (Austrian variant of 'Februar'); dative singular as the object of 'im'.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present indicative; motion by vehicle/travel; occupies V2 position.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of 'fahre'.
Preposition indicating direction; governs dative; used with place names without an article.
Proper noun (city name); destination governed by 'nach' (no article).

sentences.target: Der Kurs startet im Feber wieder.

translations.de: Der Kurs startet im Feber wieder.
translations.en: The course starts again in February.
translations.es: El curso vuelve a empezar en febrero.
translations.zh-Hans: 这门课会在二月重新开课。
translations.yue: 呢個課程二月會再開始。
translations.vi: Khóa học sẽ bắt đầu lại vào tháng Hai.
translations.ar: تبدأ الدورة مرة أخرى في فبراير.
translations.nl: De cursus begint weer in februari.
translations.hi: कोर्स फिर से फरवरी में शुरू होगा.
translations.pl: Kurs znowu zaczyna się w lutym.
translations.el: Το μάθημα ξεκινά ξανά τον Φεβρουάριο.
translations.id: Kursus mulai lagi pada bulan Februari.
translations.ro: Cursul începe din nou în februarie.
translations.ja: その講座は2月にまた始まります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of 'Kurs'.
Common noun; subject of the sentence; nominative singular.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; intransitive 'to start/begin'.
Contraction of 'in dem'; governs dative; introduces a temporal PP.
Proper name of the month; dative singular as object of 'im'.
Adverb of repetition; modifies 'startet'.

sentences.target: Im Feber ist es oft sehr kalt.
sentences.reading: /ɪm ˈfeːbɐ ɪst ɛs ɔft zeːɐ kalt/

translations.de: Im Feber ist es oft sehr kalt.
translations.ipa: /ɪm ˈfeːbɐ ɪst ɛs ɔft zeːɐ kalt/
translations.en: In February it is often very cold.
translations.es: En febrero suele hacer mucho frío.
translations.fr: En février, il fait souvent très froid.
translations.it: A febbraio fa spesso molto freddo.
translations.ru: В феврале часто бывает очень холодно.
translations.pt: Em fevereiro costuma fazer muito frio.
translations.tr: Şubatta sık sık çok soğuk olur.
translations.ar: في فبراير يكون الجو غالبًا شديد البرودة.
translations.nl: In februari is het vaak erg koud.
translations.uk: У лютому часто буває дуже холодно.
translations.hi: फरवरी में अक्सर बहुत ठंड होती है.
translations.pl: W lutym często jest bardzo zimno.
translations.el: Τον Φεβρουάριο κάνει συχνά πολύ κρύο.
translations.nb: I februar er det ofte veldig kaldt.
translations.id: Pada bulan Februari sering kali sangat dingin.
translations.sv: I februari är det ofta väldigt kallt.
translations.ro: În februarie este adesea foarte frig.
translations.cs: V únoru bývá často velmi chлaдho.
translations.da: I februar er det ofte meget koldt.
translations.ja: 2月はとても寒い日が多いです。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; governs dative; introduces a temporal PP.
Proper name of the month; dative singular as object of 'im'.
Finite copula, 3rd person singular present; links subject 'es' to the predicative adjective 'kalt'.
Personal/impersonal pronoun, nominative neuter singular; expletive subject in weather/impersonal construction.
Adverb of frequency; modifies the predicate.
Degree adverb; intensifies the adjective 'kalt'.
Predicative adjective (subject complement) with the copula 'ist'.

sentences.target: Meine Schwester hat im Feber Geburtstag.

translations.de: Meine Schwester hat im Feber Geburtstag.
translations.en: My sister's birthday is in February.
translations.es: El cumpleaños de mi hermana es en febrero.
translations.fr: L'anniversaire de ma sœur est en février.
translations.it: Il compleanno di mia sorella è a febbraio.
translations.ru: У моей сестры день рождения в феврале.
translations.pt: O aniversário da minha irmã é em fevereiro.
translations.vi: Sinh nhật của em gái tôi vào tháng Hai.
translations.nl: Mijn zus is in februari jarig.
translations.uk: День народження моєї сестри в лютому.
translations.hu: A nővéremnek februárban van a születésnapja.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन का जन्मदिन फरवरी में है.
translations.pl: Urodziny mojej siostry są w lutym.
translations.el: Τα γενέθλια της αδερφής μου είναι τον Φεβρουάριο.
translations.nb: Søsteren min har bursdag i februar.
translations.id: Ulang tahun kakak perempuan saya pada bulan Februari.
translations.sv: Min syster fyller år i februari.
translations.ro: Ziua de naștere a surorii mele este în februarie.
translations.cs: Moje sestra má narozeniny v únoru.
translations.da: Min søster har fødselsdag i februar.
translations.ja: 私の妹の誕生日は2月です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees with 'Schwester' (feminine nominative singular); part of the subject NP.
Common noun; head of the subject NP; nominative singular.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; takes 'Geburtstag' as its direct object.
Contraction of 'in dem'; governs dative; introduces a temporal PP.
Proper name of the month; dative singular as object of 'im'.
Common noun; direct object (accusative singular) of 'hat' in the expression 'Geburtstag haben'.
